<!-- Thanks for contributing to ACRF. Please complete the checklist below. -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Kind of change

- [ ] Reference tool: bug fix
- [ ] Reference tool: new feature or improvement
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Methodology clarification (non-normative wording)
- [ ] Methodology change (normative  - please also open a `methodology-change` issue if you haven't already)

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`pytest`).
- [ ] Lint passes (`ruff check .`).
- [ ] New behavior has new tests.
- [ ] If the methodology text changed, `docs/methodology.md` and `CHANGELOG.md` are updated.
- [ ] If the public API of the tool changed, the `README.md` quickstart still works.

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Fixes #123, Addresses #456 -->
